Hi Walyson, thanks for coming. Can you give me a quick update on the Europe project?
Of course. So far, we have made good progress. We have already signed two contracts, and we have achieved our target volume.
That is excellent. I am very pleased with the progress. Is there any problem I should know about?
I want to highlight one point. The samples have not arrived yet, therefore there has been a small delay. That order is still pending.
Thank you for telling me. Please keep me informed. In addition, can you prepare a short overview for the board?
Certainly. I have not finished the full report yet, but I will send the overview by Friday. The project is on track.
I have an update on the project for you.
So far, we have made good progress.

There has been a small delay; however, we are on track.
I have not finished the report yet, but I will send it soon.

Hi, this is Walyson with a quick status update on the Europe project. So far, we have made very good progress. We have already signed two contracts with new buyers, and we have reached an important milestone: we have achieved our target volume for the quarter. In addition, the logistics team has improved the shipping plan, so the project is on track. However, I want to highlight one problem. The samples from one origin have not arrived yet, therefore there has been a small delay on one order. The status of that order is still pending, but I have contacted the supplier, and as a result they have promised the samples for Monday. I have not finished the final report yet, but I will send a full overview to the director by Friday. Overall, the quarter has been strong, and I am confident we will hit every target.

Hello Walyson, this is Diana, the director. Thank you for your update. I have read your report, and I am very pleased with the progress. The team has done excellent work this quarter. We have signed more contracts than last year, and we have already passed our main milestone. However, I have one question about the delay. I understand the samples have not arrived yet, so please keep me informed about that pending order. In addition, the board has asked for a short overview of our results, therefore I would like you to prepare a few slides for next week. Highlight the contracts we have won and the targets we have achieved. As a result of your strong work, the board is happy, and we are on track for a great year. Well done, and let me know if you need any help with the presentation.

First, give a short overview of the project so far. Next, highlight the milestones you have reached and the targets you have achieved. Then, report any problem, for example a delay or a pending order. After that, explain what you have done about it and the result. Finally, say what is still on track and when you will send the full report.
